lexical_units.contextual_meaning: the nation or government continues or ceases political existence
lexical_units.basic_meaning: a living organism continues alive, dies, perishes, survives, or endures bodily strain
lexical_units.contrast_explanation: A polity is not a biological organism, but its political existence is construed as bodily life or death.
lexical_units.comparison_basis: Political survival is understood through organismic life and death.
lexical_units.review_notes: Body-politic survival language; use as MIPVU evidence only with its local national subject.
